title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 246.060 - County warrant laws apply to district warrants
text:
246.060.  County warrant laws apply to district warrants. — The law of this state, under which county warrants are issued, sold, transferred, assigned, presented for payment, and paid, shall apply to all warrants issued by any drainage or levee districts in Missouri organized under any existing, special or future law of this state.
(RSMo 1939 § 12474) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 10884; 1919 § 4579
